subscriptions_groups_empty: No groups yet. Create one to filter your feed.
subscriptions_import_body: Paste RSS OPML outlines, Google Takeout CSV rows, or YouTube channel URLs.
subscriptions_empty_latest_body: Import or subscribe to channels, then refresh the feed to see new uploads here.
subscriptions_empty_manage_body: Try a different search or import your YouTube subscriptions.
subscriptions_feed_error: Failed to load latest subscription videos.
notifications_empty_body: You're all caught up. New uploads from your subscriptions will appear here.
empty_subscriptions_body: Subscribe to channels to see their latest videos here
home_feed_disabled_body: Turn Home Feed back on in Settings to load recommendations.
explore_empty_category: No videos found for this category.
explore_error_subtitle: Refresh the page or try another category.
saved_shorts_subtitle: Shorts saved from the player menu.
saved_shorts_empty_body: Use Save to library from a Short's menu and it will appear here.
saved_shorts_no_match_body: Try a different search or filter.
albums_library_empty_body: Save albums from YouTube Music or create your own and they'll show up here.
albums_no_match_body: Try a different search, filter, or sort option.
album_search_hint: Search for songs to add to this album
clear_watch_history_alert_body: This will remove all videos from your watch history. This action cannot be undone.
watch_history_subtitle: Revisit your viewing timeline by day.
empty_watch_history_body: Videos you watch will appear here
empty_liked_body: Videos and music you like will appear here
likes_subtitle: Everything you have liked across videos and music.
empty_likes_body: Videos and music you like will appear here
clear_likes_alert_body: This will remove all liked videos and music. This action cannot be undone.
download_video_subtitle: Choose a resolution. Flow downloads and combines the video and audio tracks locally.
download_video_progress_subtitle: Your adaptive video is downloading and being prepared for playback.
download_music_subtitle: Save the original high-quality audio stream for offline playback.
download_original_container_note: Flow preserves the source codec and container without lossy transcoding.
handoff_video_unavailable: Couldn't open that video in Flow.
download_no_adaptive_formats: No compatible adaptive video formats are available for this item.
download_no_logs: No diagnostic messages have been recorded.
download_activity_missing: This download is no longer in the activity list.
downloads_subtitle: Everything you've saved for offline playback.
downloads_empty_body: Videos and music you download will appear here for offline playback.
downloads_clear_confirm_body: This permanently removes every downloaded file and its saved poster, lyrics, and SponsorBlock data.
error_boundary_subtitle: Flow ran into an unexpected error. Reloading usually fixes it.
settings_diagnostics_desc: View app logs and report a problem
diagnostics_subtitle: App logs to help track down problems
diagnostics_description: These logs capture recent activity and errors so bugs can be diagnosed. They contain video/error identifiers only — never passwords, tokens, or personal account data. Copy them and open a GitHub issue so the problem can be fixed.
diagnostics_clear_confirm: Clear all saved logs? This cannot be undone.
diagnostics_report_copied: Logs copied — paste them into the new GitHub issue
diagnostics_report_opened: Opened GitHub — attach your copied logs
queue_empty_body: Add videos from any video card menu.
theme_page_description: Choose a palette and tune how Flow looks in light, dark, and pure-black modes.
theme_variant_description: Every palette includes a light, dark, and AMOLED treatment.
theme_presets_description: Curated palettes inspired by Flow for Android, Mihon, and Terax.
theme_custom_description: Your palettes are stored locally with the rest of your app settings.
theme_editor_description: Set each semantic color for all three variants.
theme_description_default: The original Flow palette with the YouTube red accent.
theme_description_monochrome: A neutral, distraction-free palette with maximum clarity.
theme_description_catppuccin: Soothing pastel Latte and Mocha-inspired colors.
theme_description_green_apple: Fresh green accents with soft organic surfaces.
theme_description_lavender: Calm violet tones with gentle contrast.
theme_description_tako: Mihon-inspired purple with warm companion tones.
theme_description_yin_yang: Balanced black and white in its purest form.
theme_description_strawberry_daiquiri: A bright berry palette with soft cream surfaces.
theme_description_kanagawa: Inky blues and warm lotus tones inspired by Hokusai.
theme_description_tokyo_night: Calm blue-violet colors drawn from the night city.
theme_description_rose_pine: Natural pine, rose, and gold-tinted neutrals.
theme_description_solarized: A precision low-glare blue and cyan palette.
theme_description_tide: Deep slate surfaces with muted teal.
theme_description_sage: Muted forest green that stays calm and soft.
theme_description_caffeine: Coffee tones balanced with cream and espresso.
theme_description_claude: Warm clay accents on paper-like surfaces.
settings_note_skip_silence_requires_audi: Needs Web Audio silence analysis before release.
settings_note_stable_volume_requires_aud: Needs shared Web Audio gain/compressor pipeline.
settings_note_volume_boost_requires_audi: Needs Web Audio gain because native media volume caps at 1.
settings_note_no_video_mini_player: No current video mini-player target exists.
settings_note_explore_target_needs_confi: Desktop video Explore target needs confirmation.
settings_note_shorts_playback_path_missi: No separate Shorts playback path found.
settings_note_media_cache_accounting_mis: No media cache accounting target found.
settings_save_failed_message: Your previous value was restored. Try again in a moment.
settings_invalid_value_message: That value is not allowed for this setting.
taste_subtitle: Manage the topics FlowNeuro should seek out or avoid when shaping your recommendations.
taste_save_failed: Could not save that preference. Your previous state was restored.
taste_add_interest_desc: Type any topic you want Flow to learn as a positive signal.
taste_browse_interests_desc: These are the same topic groups used during onboarding.
taste_block_topic_desc: Hide recommendations matching a topic, keyword, or phrase.
taste_quick_block_desc: Common topics people often remove from recommendations.
taste_no_block_suggestions: All quick suggestions are already blocked.
settings_stable_volume_desc: Normalize audio volume levels across videos
settings_remember_speed_desc: Restore last used playback speed on next video
settings_speed_slider_desc: Show a continuous speed slider instead of presets
settings_seek_interval_desc: Seconds to skip forward or backward
settings_skip_controls_desc: Show seek jump buttons in mini player
settings_next_previous_desc: Show track navigation in mini player
settings_auto_pip_desc: Enter PiP when navigating away from the player
settings_pip_toggle_desc: Show the PiP button on the player overlay
settings_fullscreen_title_desc: Show video title during fullscreen playback
settings_adaptive_player_desc: Scale viewport to match video aspect ratio
settings_video_title_lines_desc: Max lines for video titles (0 = unlimited)
settings_download_dialog_desc: Style of the download options menu
settings_app_logo_desc: Show logo in the home header
settings_home_shorts_shelf_desc: Show Shorts shelf on the home page
settings_hide_watched_desc: Hide videos you have already watched
settings_disable_shorts_player_desc: Open Shorts in the standard player
settings_shorts_playback_mode_desc: Choose what happens when a Short finishes
settings_shorts_auto_scroll_seconds_desc: Advance after %s seconds when the Short is longer than the timer
settings_notifications_enabled_desc: Notify me when subscribed channels upload new videos
settings_notification_interval_desc: How often Flow checks your subscriptions for new uploads
settings_refresh_startup_desc: Fetch new videos when the app opens
settings_region_picker_desc: Show globe icon in Explore header
settings_rebuffer_recovery_desc: Buffer required to resume after a stall (ms)
settings_enable_proxy_desc: Route API traffic through a proxy server
settings_backup_scope_desc: What data to include in backups
settings_export_data_desc: Save settings as a JSON backup file
settings_clear_cache_desc: Remove watch history, subscriptions, and saved playlists
settings_clear_confirm: Clear watch history, subscriptions, and saved playlists? This cannot be undone.
settings_about_subtitle: Desktop companion to Flow for Android, powered by the local FlowNeuro engine
settings_license_text: Flow Desktop is free and open-source software distributed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. You are free to use, modify, and redistribute this software under the terms of the license.
import_subtitle: Restore subscriptions, playlists, and watch history from a backup file
import_settings_desc: Restore app preferences from a Flow backup
import_supported_formats: Supports Flow backups (.zip/.json), Google Takeout, NewPipe, LibreTube, and FreeTube formats
import_error_no_json_archive: No JSON file was found in the archive.
import_file_not_recognized: The file format is not recognized.
import_flowneuro_card_body: When watch history or subscriptions are imported, the local recommendation engine automatically seeds interest profiles from titles, keywords, and creators.
donations_subtitle: Flow is free, open-source software built by an independent developer. There are no ads, no trackers, and no Flow account. Your support keeps it that way.
donations_patreon_desc: Patreon supports card, PayPal, and Apple Pay, with recurring or one-time contributions.
donations_crypto_hint: Scan a QR code with a compatible wallet, or copy the address. Always verify the address and network before sending.
donations_thank_you: Thank you for helping keep Flow independent.
donation_prompt_message: Flow is free and ad-free, maintained by one independent developer. If it has earned a place in your day, a small contribution helps keep it growing.
donation_prompt_methods: Patreon · BTC · ETH · SOL · USDT · XMR
music_blocked_artists_desc: Artists you've blocked are never recommended in music.
music_autoplay_desc: Keep playing similar music when the queue ends
music_queue_autoplay_hint: Turn on Autoplay for nonstop music
music_taste_desc: Your local music profile — learned entirely on-device from what you listen to.
music_no_genres_yet: No genre signals yet — keep listening.
music_no_artists_yet: No artists learned yet — play some music to build your profile.
music_no_patterns_yet: Not enough listening yet to chart your daily rhythm.
search_empty_body: Search for videos, songs, albums, artists or channels to stream natively in pristine quality.
search_no_results_body: Try a different search term or category.
watch_no_comments: No comments available for this video.
watch_error_body: We couldn't load this video. It may be unavailable or region-locked.
deep_flow_mode_subtitle: Pause learning and browse without shaping your FlowNeuro profile.
deep_flow_save_history_subtitle: Keep watched videos in history while Deep Flow is active. FlowNeuro still will not learn from them.
deep_flow_active_until_disabled: Deep Flow stays active until you turn it off.
sync_page_subtitle: Move playlists, history, likes and your taste profile between your devices — over your local network, end-to-end encrypted, no account needed.
sync_send_subtitle: Show a code for another device to scan.
sync_receive_subtitle: Scan or paste a code from another device.
sync_show_qr_button: No camera? Show a QR to scan
sync_show_qr_hint: This device shows a code; the other device scans it and sends its data here.
sync_pair_scan_subtitle: Open Flow on the other device and scan to receive your data.
sync_pair_receive_title: Show this to the other device
sync_pair_receive_subtitle: On the other device, scan this code and choose what to send here.
sync_verification_hint: Make sure both devices show the same code.
sync_camera_error: Could not start the camera. Paste the code manually instead, or check camera permissions.
sync_paste_is_sas: That's the verification code, not the sync code. Scan the QR with the camera, or paste the full sync data (it starts with "{").
sync_paste_invalid: This doesn't look like a sync code. Scan the QR with the camera instead.
sync_consent_merge_subtitle: Review what will be merged into this device.
sync_consent_allow_subtitle: This device will send the selected data to the connected device.
sync_up_to_date: Everything was already up to date.
player_error_age_restricted_hint: This video is only available to signed-in users who have verified their age, so it can't be played anonymously.
player_error_private_hint: The owner has set this video to private. Only people they've invited can watch it.
player_error_paid_hint: This video requires a purchase, rental, or channel membership on YouTube.
player_error_geo_hint: The content owner has restricted this video in your country. A VPN may let you watch it.
player_error_music_premium_hint: This track is only available to YouTube Music Premium subscribers.
player_error_bot_check_hint: YouTube is asking for verification before serving this stream. Try again in a moment, or open it in a browser and solve the check.
player_error_account_terminated_hint: This channel has been closed or terminated, so its videos can't be played.
player_error_not_available_hint: This video may have been deleted, made private, or removed by YouTube. Try again in case it's a temporary hiccup.
player_error_extractor_hint: Flow couldn't parse the playback data — YouTube may have changed its format. Try again, and update Flow if it keeps failing.
player_error_streaming_hint: The media stream couldn't be read. This is often a temporary YouTube issue — try again.
player_error_network_hint: Flow couldn't reach YouTube. Check your internet connection and try again.
player_error_validation_hint: This content couldn't be requested. If you reached it from a link, it may be malformed.
player_error_internal_hint: An unexpected error occurred inside Flow. Copy the logs so this can be diagnosed, then try again.
player_error_generic_hint: This content couldn't be played. Please try again.
